What's eating all the RAM? Top 3 please

{"sort_by": "memory", "processes": [{"pid": 4821, "name": "mlx_lm.server", "memory_percent": 55.1, "cpu_percent": 72.4}, {"pid": 4903, "name": "uvicorn", "memory_percent": 2.1, "cpu_percent": 3.2}, {"pid": 312, "name": "WindowServer", "memory_percent": 1.8, "cpu_percent": 4.1}]}

Next step: Only worry if memory_percent keeps growing between requests; that would suggest a cache leak.
